scripts.build: tsc && npx tailwindcss -i ./public/global.css -o ./public/output.css --minify && tsc --project tsconfig.scripts.json && npx esbuild dist/main.js --bundle --outfile=public/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && npx esbuild dist/layout.js --bundle --outfile=public/layout.bundle.js --platform=browser --format=iife
scripts.build:sidecar: npm run prepare:frida-binding && npm run prepare:agent-resource && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/scripts',{recursive:true});require('fs').copyFileSync('public/scripts/agent.js','dist/scripts/agent.js');require('fs').copyFileSync('public/scripts/mute-logging.js','dist/scripts/mute-logging.js')" && npx pkg dist/bridge.js -t node18-win-x64 -o src-tauri/binaries/bridge-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.dist: node -e "require('dotenv').config();const{execSync:r}=require('child_process');r('bun run build && bun run build:sidecar && npx tauri build',{stdio:'inherit',env:{...process.env}})"
scripts.//release: bun run release [patch|minor|major] — 버전 올리고 빌드 + push + GitHub 릴리스 (기본: patch)
scripts.//version: npm version 시 tauri.conf.json, Cargo.toml 버전 자동 동기화
scripts.release: node -e "const{execSync:r}=require('child_process');require('dotenv').config();const bump=process.argv[1]||'patch';r('git add -A && git commit -m \"chore: pre-release\" --allow-empty',{stdio:'inherit'});r('npm version '+bump,{stdio:'inherit'});r('bun run build && bun run build:sidecar && npx tauri build',{stdio:'inherit',env:{...process.env}});const v=require('./package.json').version;r('git push origin main && git push origin v'+v+' && gh release create v'+v+' src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/*.exe --title \"v'+v+'\" --generate-notes',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.clean:win: rd /s /q dist && rd /s /q build && del public/output.css /q
scripts.version: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const f=require('fs');const tc=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json','utf8'));tc.version=v;f.writeFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json',JSON.stringify(tc,null,2)+'\n');const ct=f.readFileSync('src-tauri/Cargo.toml','utf8');f.writeFileSync('src-tauri/Cargo.toml',ct.replace(/^version\s*=\s*\"[^\"]*\"/m,'version = \"'+v+'\"'));" && git add src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/Cargo.toml
